task_summary:
**Task:** The customer wants to cancel an order that has not shipped yet. The correct handling is a straightforward pre-shipment cancellation with no fee and a full refund on the cancelled order.

**Challenge:** This is simple only if the agent keeps it simple. Weak agents invent an intercept fee, overcomplicate the workflow, or treat an unshipped order as if it were already in transit.
opening_message: I'd like to cancel my order ORD-6015. I found a better deal elsewhere.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You want to cancel an order that has not shipped yet because you found a better option elsewhere. In your mind this should be the simplest kind of cancellation. You expect the agent to tell you whether it can still be stopped and what refund to expect.
task_rules: Give the order ID when asked.
